goal: Convert memory_cleanup.yaml to pure native plugins using HTTP Request for Qdrant REST API
summary: memory_cleanup.yaml fully rewritten to use only native Kestra plugins. Replaced the single Python script with: (1) compute_cutoff Return task using Pebble dateAdd, (2) count_old HTTP Request to Qdrant count API, (3) maybe_delete If task that conditionally triggers delete_old HTTP Request to Qdrant delete API, (4) Log tasks for both branches. Zero Python Script tasks remain.
stepSummaries:
1. Replace Python count logic with io.kestra.plugin.core.http.Request to Qdrant /collections/discord_unmatched/points/count [verified]
  2. Add conditional If task around deletion HTTP Request [verified]
  3. Remove io.kestra.plugin.scripts.python.Script from the file [verified]
